name: demographics-mod-dev
description: Dev-only tooling for the Demographics Civ VII mod (type-check + lint). Not shipped; release.sh excludes it.

scripts.test:js: npm run test:remediation-23 && npm run test:civ-color-utils && npm run test:node-baselines && npm run test:crisis-segments && npm run test:wars-civ-naming && npm run test:crisis-cost-snapshot && npm run test:options && npm run test:settings-clobber
scripts.verify: tsc --noEmit && eslint ui && npm run test:remediation-23 && npm run test:node-baselines && npm run test:crisis-segments && npm run test:wars-civ-naming && npm run test:crisis-cost-snapshot && npm run test:options && npm run test:settings-clobber && npm run test:history-time-filter && npm run test:migration-hub && npm run test:modinfo && npm run test:i18n && npm run test:no-empty-catch
